'''charasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wacker|wacker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wacker|wacker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| charasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæræsæth|chæræsæth]] || [[word:chæræsæj|chæræsæj]] || [[word:chæræsæsh|chæræsæsh]] || [[word:chæræsæ|chæræsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chararasath|chararasath]] || [[word:chararasaj|chararasaj]] || [[word:chararasash|chararasash]] || [[word:chararasa|chararasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:charasath|charasath]] || [[word:charasaj|charasaj]] || [[word:charasash|charasash]] || [[word:charasa|charasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:charafsath|charafsath]] || [[word:charafsaj|charafsaj]] || [[word:charafsash|charafsash]] || [[word:charafsaf|charafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:charasatha|charasatha]] || [[word:charasaja|charasaja]] || [[word:charasasha|charasasha]] || [[word:charasaka|charasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:charasath|charasath]] || [[word:charasaj|charasaj]] || [[word:charasash|charasash]] || [[word:charasa|charasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:charasathal|charasathal]] || [[word:charasajal|charasajal]] || [[word:charasashal|charasashal]] || [[word:charasakal|charasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:charasathatha|charasathatha]] || [[word:charasajaja|charasajaja]] || [[word:charasashasha|charasashasha]] || [[word:charasaka|charasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:charasathan|charasathan]] || [[word:charasajan|charasajan]] || [[word:charasashan|charasashan]] || [[word:charasakan|charasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:charasathaoro|charasathaoro]] || [[word:charasajaoro|charasajaoro]] || [[word:charasashaoro|charasashaoro]] || [[word:charasakaoro|charasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
